Welcome to

Our Table

Caribbean soul, served fresh.

At our Kafé, we serve delicious Creole meals for seafood lovers, meat lovers, and plant-based customers!

Mouth-watering Creole meals served fresh with vegetables, spices, and a hint of cultural influence.

We believe an island meal should consist of fresh, tasty ingredients that will satisfy your cravings.

Fresh Seafood

Creole Spices

Plant-Based

Island Soul

Made with Love

What Our Guests Say

"If you want real traditional Caribbean food then this is the place to be."

E M · Google

"The Guinness ribs and garlic bread with homemade coconut oil were incredible. Best rum punch on the island."

Rebecca · Google

"One of the best places to eat on the island! Friendly staff and wonderful chef."

Tomek Z. · Google

"Everything was cooked to perfection! So intentional with every dish."

Ysabelle B. · Google

"The ribs in Guinness and rum sauce were absolutely amazing. Perfect portions."

Carolina D. · Google

"Hands down the best food we had on the island."

TripAdvisor

"Absolutely gorgeous place. The cooler drinks are so refreshing."

Helen S. · Google

"The jerk chicken was so flavourful, and the ribs so juicy and tender."

Ashley M. · Google

"Authentic local cuisine. Menu changes every day based on what's in season. Absolutely amazing."

Keith S. · Google

"The rum cake with drunken raisins was unforgettable. Wish we'd found this place sooner."

Geoff & Christine · Oldies On Tour

"My snapper was cooked absolutely perfectly. My wife's salmon was wonderful."

TripAdvisor

"The food is absolutely amazing and Dawne is such a nice lady."

TripAdvisor

"The whole experience was by far the best we've had on beautiful Antigua."

TripAdvisor

"One of the sweetest people we've met on the island. So warm and inviting."

TripAdvisor

"The seafood medley in coconut curry sauce — you can smell all the spices. Mouth watering."

TripAdvisor

"Go out of your way to sample Dawne's food — you will not be disappointed!"

TripAdvisor

"The drinks with house-made rum were particularly enticing and refreshing."

TripAdvisor

"Highly highly recommend!"

TripAdvisor
